* Add icon to the Snapcraft image. * Add a .desktop file to the Linux snap so that it can be run from the dash as well as the command line. * Update the Linux snap confinement from devmode to strict. * Move the snap stuff to the snap/ directory. Gradle builds to the snap/build directory.
